Home.title: Benjamín Díaz
Home.subtitle: Software Engineer
Home.description: Software Engineer based in Chile 🇨🇱. Passionate about building software and using technology creatively ❤️🐧🐻‍.

drizip.title: Drizip SpA
drizip.subtitle: Software Engineer

description.p1: Drizip is a platform that allows car owners to rent their cars to other people, available in Chile and México.
description.p2: During my time at Drizip I worked on the backend and frontend of the platform and leveraged the infrastructure on AWS.

drizip.tags: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Meteor, AWS

roldic.title: Roldic Commerce SpA
roldic.subtitle: Proyecto de desarrollo de software

description.p1: Roldic is a store that sells bicycles and their spare parts and accessories.
description.p2: For this project, I developed a complete E-Commerce platform, including storefront, backoffice and an API that connects everything.

roldic.tags: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Express, MongoDB, Segment, AWS, Vercel, MercadoPago, Transbank

oso.title: Oso Sigiloso
oso.subtitle: Video game

description.p1: As part of an undergraduate research, I developed a video game to demonstrate a simple process to get started in game development.
description.p2: For this project, I wrote the code and made the music, art and the rest of the assets.

oso.tags: Unity, C#, Logic Pro X, Affinity Designer, Krita, Blender

insideSecurity.description: Software development for Inside Security's application factory. Implementation of best practices and design and architecture patterns in software repositories. Secure software development.

drizip.description: As a software engineer at Drizip, I helped develop and build the platform's infrastructure from its early stages. Over the years, I individually and as a team implemented many new features for the platform.

ivory.description: I started as a part-time intern during my last year of university. During that time I helped create web platforms and mobile applications for two simultaneous projects.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.subtitle: Feel free to contact me if you want to ask me anything or just to say hi.
